attachments.description: Bug 2010045 - Show insecure connection status on certificate exceptions. r=daisuke
attachments.creator: dharvey@mozilla.com
attachments.summary: Bug 2010045 - Show insecure connection status on certificate exceptions. r=daisuke

summary: trust panel: "Connection secure" displayed for self-signed certificate with added exception

comments.creator: manuel@mozilla.com
comments.raw_text:
STR:

1. Go to https://self-signed.badssl.com/
2. Accept the risk
3. open shield icon

Got result: "Connection Secure" is displayed with intact lock icon
Expected result: "Connection not secure" is displayed with lock icon containing warning symbol

Perhaps also expected result: a warning icon on the trust icon within the URL bar that the connection is not secure.
